component.name: Lycan
component.summary: Lightweight PWA manager for Linux desktops

description.p: Lycan is a lightweight PWA (Progressive Web App) manager that lets you create desktop applications from any website. It uses WebKitGTK for minimal resource consumption and integrates with your desktop environment via standard .desktop files.

ul.li: Create PWAs from any URL with automatic favicon fetching
Built-in ad/tracker blocker for reduced resource usage
TUI interface for managing your PWA collection
Works with i3, Hyprland, Sway, GNOME, KDE, and more

description.p: WebKit performance tuning, persistent PWA profiles, private directory permissions, hardware-based webkit-tuning.json with detect-system CLI, expanded --help, README updates, and dependency cleanup.
Initial release with core PWA management features.
